intro: Over the past two weeks, ZCyberNews has tracked 23 articles on Windows security, with Kyber, Chaotic Eclipse, and VECT Ransomware as the top threat actors. The most frequently cited vulnerabilities include CVE-2024-1708 (CVSS 8.4), CVE-2026-33104 (CVSS 7.8), CVE-2026-26179 (CVSS 7.5), CVE-2026-32183 (CVSS 7.5), and CVE-2024-20662. These issues have primarily affected government, IT, and managed service provider sectors in North America, with 17 high-severity, 2 critical, and 4 medium-severity incidents reported.
